content.text: The PO-33 provides several parameters for shaping your samples beyond basic trimming. You can adjust pitch, volume, filter settings, and playback behavior for each sound slot independently.
Each sound can be tuned up or down from its original pitch. This is especially useful for matching samples to different keys or creating variations.

items: Turn the sound knob while holding
Clockwise = higher pitch, Counter-clockwise = lower pitch
Release to set the new default pitch

content.text: Individual sound volumes can be adjusted to balance your mix. Some samples may be recorded louder or quieter than others.

items: While holding FX, hold the sound's pad
Turn sound knob to adjust volume
Release to confirm the new level

content.text: A low-pass filter is available for each sound, useful for removing high frequencies and creating darker tones.

items: Turn the BPM knob while holding
Clockwise = brighter (filter open), Counter-clockwise = darker (filter closed)
Release to set the filter cutoff

content.title: Filter Sweeps
content.text: For real-time filter sweeps during playback, use the filter effect (FX + pad) instead of the static per-sound filter setting.
Samples can be set to different playback behaviors depending on how you want them to respond when triggered.

rows: Sample is auto-sliced across multiple pads

content.text: Slice mode automatically divides a sample into equal parts and spreads them across the drum pads (9-16). This is useful for chopping breakbeats and drum loops.

items: Record or select a sample in slot 1-8 (melodic)
Hold write + hold the sample's pad
Press pad 9 to enable slice mode
The sample is now divided across pads 9-16

content.title: Slice Behavior
content.text: Slices share the parent sample's memory. Deleting the parent sample also removes all slices.
